items.title: If Matisse Thybulle's contact is fully guaranteed (which is most likely), the Lakers will have 16 fully guaranteed standard contracts on their books. That means they'll need to waive or trade at least one fully guaranteed player.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
If Matisse Thybulle's contact is fully guaranteed (which is most likely), the Lakers will have 16 fully guaranteed standard contracts on their books. That means they'll need to waive or trade at least one fully guaranteed player.

Thybulle will hit at the vet minimum amount of $2.5M for this season.

items.title: New: Dallas Wings star Paige Bueckers will not play tonight against the New York Liberty. Bueckers was cleared from having a concussion following post-game evaluation and is not currently in WNBA concussion protocol, but she will miss tonight’s game while dealing with soreness.

items.body_excerpt: New: Dallas Wings star Paige Bueckers will not play tonight against the New York Liberty. Bueckers was cleared from having a concussion following post-game evaluation and is not currently in WNBA concussion protocol, but she will miss tonight’s game while dealing with soreness.

Probably the greatest soccer player ever probably just played in his final World Cup.

That's something worth reflecting on, in short order.

For CBS Sports, a column on the impact and everlasting legacy of Messi, whose name will live forever and whose impact on American soccer can't be overstated.

media.title: Lionel Messi didn't win second World Cup, but 2026 run secured his status as an all-time global sports icon

items.title: Tyler Nickel shot 41.3% on 9.2 three-point attempts per game at Summer League.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
Tyler Nickel shot 41.3% on 9.2 three-point attempts per game at Summer League. 

He is just the second player this decade to average more than nine 3PTA per game and shoot over 40% from downtown in Vegas (the other cat in this club is Cavs' Sam Merrill) 

Leon found one.

items.title: I'm a mostly lapsed comics guy, but I like trying to read collected good stories and catch up on source material for the big stuff. A search for "secret wars reading guide" turned up this 221-issue graphic of stuff mostly not available via TPB at the library. I guess I'll be goin
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: I'm a mostly lapsed comics guy, but I like trying to read collected good stories and catch up on source material for the big stuff. A search for "secret wars reading guide" turned up this 221-issue graphic of stuff mostly not available via TPB at the library. I guess I'll be going in pretty cold!

images.alt: A rundown of the 221 issues of recommended reading for "Jonathan Hickman's Secret Wars Saga" from r/marvelcomics.
